revision.text:
[[ja:比自岐神社]] {{Expand Japanese|比自岐神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Hishikino Shrine | native_name = 比自岐神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Hishikino Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|34.705977|136.188371}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }} {{nihongo|'''Hishikino Shrine'''|比自岐神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Iga Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database * {{ill|Shikinai Hiteisha|lt=Shikinai Hiteisha|ja|比定社|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11380647|ltq=Q11380647|qid=Q11380647|1=List of Shikinaisha in Iga Province}} ** Series ordinal: 18 ** P155: ᥓᥣᥱ ᥙᥣᥢᥱ|tet|Japaun|te|జపాన్|tg|Ҷопон|th|ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|thnews|หมวดหมู่:ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|tig|ጃፓን|ti|ጃፓን|tk|Ýaponiýa|tl|Hapon|tly|Japonijə|tn|Japan|tok|ma Nijon|to|Siapani|tpi|Siapan|trv|Tanah Tunux|tr|Japonya|trnews|Kategori:Japonya|trquote|Japonya|trvoyage|Japonya|ts|Japani|tt|Япония|tum|Japan|tw|Japan|tyv|Япония|ty|Tāpōnē|udm|Япония|ug|ياپونىيە|uk|Японія|uknews|Категорія:Японія|ukquote|Японія|ukvoyage|Японія|ur|جاپان|uz|Yaponiya|vec|Japon|vep|Japonii|ve|Japan|vi|Nhật Bản|vibooks|Các quốc gia/Nhật Bản|vivoyage|Nhật Bản|vls|Japan|vo|Yapän|war|Hapon|wa|Djapon|wo|Sapoŋ|wuu|日本|xal|Ниxуудин Нутг|xh|IJapani|xmf|იაპონია|yi|יאפאן|yo|Japan|za|Nyiedbonj|zea|Japan|zgh|ⵏⵉⴱⵓⵏ|zh_classical|日本|zh_min_nan|Ji̍t-pún|zh_yue|日本|zh|日本|zhnews|Category:日本|zhquote|日本|zhvoyage|日本|zu|IJaphani|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '三重県伊賀市比自岐683', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:比自岐神社]] {{wikidata link|Q135039252}} == Japanese content == {{神社 | 名称 = Hijiki Shrine | 画像 = [[File:Hijiki-jinja, shaden-3.jpg|250px]]
Precincts | 所在地 = {{ill|lt=Mie Prefecture|Q128196|qid=Q128196|1=Mie Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Iga|Q460820|qid=Q460820|1=Iga, Mie}} Hijiki 683 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = Hijiki-no-Kami | 神体 = | 社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}}, former prefectural shrine | 創建 = | 本殿 = | 別名 = | 札所等 = | 例祭 = November 12; Gion Festival 4th Sunday of July | 神事 = | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Mie|label=Hijiki Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Hijiki Shrine''' (ひじきじんじゃ) is a shrine {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=enshrined|1=UNKNOWN}} in Hijiki, {{ill|lt=Iga|Q460820|qid=Q460820|1=Iga, Mie}}, {{ill|lt=Mie Prefecture|Q128196|qid=Q128196|1=Mie Prefecture}}. It is an {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Engishiki shrine|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286|lt=Shikinaisha}} and its former rank was prefectural shrine. === Origin === The founding era is unknown. Its principal deity Hijiki-no-Kami is the ancestral deity of the powerful Hijiki clan, and the clan had close ties to the court, including marrying a Hijiki clan daughter to Prince Maruhi, son of {{ill|lt=Emperor Suinin|Q314850|qid=Q314850|1=Emperor Suinin}}. In {{ill|lt=1909|Q2057|qid=Q2057|1=1909}} (Meiji 41), 33 shrines in former Hijiki village were {{ill|lt=merged enshrinements|Q11412524|qid=Q11412524|1=Co-Enshrinement}} into this shrine. In {{ill|lt=1924|Q2173|qid=Q2173|1=1924}} (Taishō 13), it was promoted to prefectural shrine{{Cite web|title=三重県神社庁 比自岐神社|url=http://kyoka.mie-jinjacho.or.jp/shrine/%e6%af%94%e8%87%aa%e5%b2%90%e7%a5%9e%e7%a4%be/|access-date=2025-12-2}}. === Enshrined deities === * Principal deity: Hijiki-no-Kami * Associated deities: {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami|1=Amaterasu|qid=Q455602}} / {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|1=Ame-no-Koyane|qid=Q2564508}} * Merged deities: Tsurugine-no-Mikoto / {{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|qid=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}} / {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Takehayasusano-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} / {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Kagutsuchi-no-Kami|1=UNKNOWN}} / {{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q10936701|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Kami|1=Ōmononushi}} / {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Uka-no-Mitama-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} / {{ill|lt=Konohanasakuyabime|UNKNOWN|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime-no-Mikoto}} / {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōyamazumi-no-Kami|1=UNKNOWN}} / {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Izanagi-no-Mikoto|1=Izanagi|qid=Q813858}} / {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōwatatsumi-no-Kami|1=UNKNOWN}} / {{ill|lt=Sugawara no Michizane|Q382005|qid=Q382005|1=Sugawara no Michizane}}{{Cite web|title=比自岐神社|url=https://genbu.net/data/iga/hijiki_title.htm|access-date=2025-12-2}} === Precincts === Hijiki-jinja, honden.jpg|Main sanctuary Hijiki-jinja, haiden.jpg|Worship hall Hijiki-jinja, torii.jpg|Torii === Annual festivals === *November 12 *Gion Festival: 4th Sunday in July === Cultural property === The Gion Festival is designated an {{ill|lt=intangible cultural property|Q2901957|qid=Q2901957|1=Intangible Cultural Property (Japan)}} of Iga City. === Notes === {{Reflist|2}} === See also === {{Commonscat|Hijiki-jinja}} *{{ill|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Iga Province|Q11380647|qid=Q11380647|1=List of Shikinaisha in Iga Province}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Hishikino Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Hishikino Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Hishikino Shrine]][[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Iga Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Mie Prefecture]] [[Category:伊賀市の歴史]] [[Category:伊賀市の建築物]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Iga Province]] [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Mie Prefecture]]
